content.problemStatement:
You are given a sequence A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​. For each valid iii, the star value of the element AiA_iAi​ is the number of valid indices j<ij \lt ij<i such that AjA_jAj​ is divisible by AiA_iAi​.

Chef is a curious person, so he wants to know the maximum star value in the given sequence. Help him find it.
constraints: Sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 100,000100,000100,000.
Subtasks**Subtask #1 (20 points):** sum  of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 5,0005,0005,000
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT which denotes the number of test cases.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN .
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ― the maximum star value.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
A5=2A_5 = 2A5​=2 divides 444, 282828 and 888, so its star value is 333. There is no element with a higher star value.
